name: Pineapple Lemon Muffins
recipeInstructions:
Serve: 4
1. In a bowl, combine brown sugar, lemon peel, nutmeg, and melted margarine.
2. Divide this mixture evenly among 16 greased muffin cups. Add a spoonful of drained pineapple and one cherry half to the bottom of each cup.
3. In another bowl, mix flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and remaining nutmeg. Make a well in the center and add beaten egg, skim milk, and vegetable oil, stirring until combined.
4. Pour this batter into the muffin cups.
5. Bake at 375 degrees F (190 degrees C) for 18 to 20 minutes or until done. Remove from oven and invert onto a wire rack to cool.
